signals.headline: Solana (SOL) Surges 10% on Record 167 Million Monthly Token Holders and Alpenglow Upgrade Progress** | **YES** | **HIGH*

signals.headline: SOUTH KOREA ANNUAL INFLATION RISES TO 2
signals.raw:
SOUTH KOREA ANNUAL INFLATION RISES TO 2.2% IN MARCH 2026, UP FROM 2.0% IN PRIOR MONTHS | NO | MED confidence**

South Korea's annual inflation rate increased to 2.2% in March 2026, from 2.0% in both January and February 2026, remaining below market forecasts of 2.4% and the Bank of Korea's (BOK) 2% target[2]. This follows January's drop to a five-month low of 2.0%, driven by lower energy and food
